page_metadata.biotools__summary: BEar Alignment Global and Local. Perform pairwise alignments of RNA secondary structure. The method exploits a new encoding for RNA secondary structure (BEAR) and a substitution matrix for RNA structural elements (MBR) .
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: BEar Alignment Global and Local. Perform pairwise alignments of RNA secondary structure. The method exploits a new encoding for RNA secondary structure (BEAR) and a substitution matrix for RNA structural elements (MBR) .
